title: Amtech I0380 30 Piece 1/4" and 3/8" Socket Set
features: DURABLE: This 30 piece 1/4" and 3/8" socket set is made from strong chrome vanadium steel for durability

CONTENTS: The versatile set includes a dual drive 1/4" and 3/8" drive, 72 tooth quick release ratchet, 1/4" and 3/8" universal joints, extension bar, a spark plug socket, an adaptor and a wide selection of 1/4" and 3/8" drive sockets
CARRY CASE: It is supplied in a sturdy, blow moulded storage case
STORAGE CASE INCLUDED: Compact case for organised storage and easy portability
MULTI-DRIVE: Compatible with 1/4" and other common drive sizes
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 30Pc 1/4" & 3/8" Socket Set See more
